list_info.科目名稱: 大型語言模型與資訊安全系統
list_info.科目英文名: Applying Large Language Models in Cybersecurity Systems
list_info.備註: AI聯盟衛星課程 /臺灣科技大學：林俊叡老師授課/線上課程/授課語言：英文 /Weekly assignments are graded on a scale of 1–5 points (0 if not submitted). The total score is calculated as 20 base points + the sum of all assignment points, with a maximum of 100 points.
